title: Trump tariffs struck down by US Supreme Court: How much has been refunded so far
summary_full: The Supreme Court's recent decision led the US government to refund a staggering eighty-one billion dollars in tariffs, overturning many of President Donald Trump's imposed tariffs. This fiscal year has already seen a notable surge in refunds according to Treasury budget data. A ruling from the US Court of International Trade in May also challenged these blanket tariffs.
